query:
INSERT INTO
    fiskeridir_vessels (
    fiskeridir_vessel_id,call_sign,registration_id,name,length,building_year,engine_power,engine_building_year,fiskeridir_vessel_type_id,norwegian_municipality_id,norwegian_county_id,fiskeridir_nation_group_id,nation_id,gross_tonnage_1969,gross_tonnage_other,rebuilding_year,deprecated,register_landing_reset
   )
SELECT
    *
FROM
    UNNEST(
        $1::BIGINT[],$2::TEXT[],$3::TEXT[],$4::TEXT[],$5::DOUBLE PRECISION[],$6::INT[],$7::INT[],$8::INT[],$9::INT[],$10::INT[],$11::INT[],$12::TEXT[],$13::TEXT[],$14::INT[],$15::INT[],$16::INT[],$17::BOOLEAN[],$18::BOOLEAN[]
    )
        ON CONFLICT (fiskeridir_vessel_id) DO UPDATE SET building_year = COALESCE(fiskeridir_vessels.building_year, EXCLUDED.building_year),engine_power = COALESCE(fiskeridir_vessels.engine_power, EXCLUDED.engine_power),engine_building_year = COALESCE(fiskeridir_vessels.engine_building_year, EXCLUDED.engine_building_year)
